_comment_nas_shared: NAS-shared deployment, client side. stdio + the locally-mounted NAS path. The kb_path arg here is redundant with kb-mcp.toml; either keep both (explicit beats config) or drop the args and rely on the toml. Make sure the mount is read-only on this machine — see README.md / README.ja.md.
_comment_alwaysLoad: alwaysLoad: true is a Claude Code v2.1.121+ option that ensures kb-mcp's tools are present at initial load (skips tool-search lookup latency). Other MCP clients (Cursor, etc.) ignore the field. Drop it if first-startup model download cost outweighs the latency win.
